# QA Checklist

## Semantic QA

- [ ] Does the overlay preserve the intended meaning?
- [ ] Did we remove filler?
- [ ] Is any compression misleading?
- [ ] Is there one idea per screen?

## Typography QA

- [ ] Are operators fully emphasized?
- [ ] Are concept anchors sparse?
- [ ] Is heavy bionic avoided?
- [ ] Is contrast sufficient?

## Placement QA

- [ ] Mouth clear when speech matters?
- [ ] Eyes clear when emotion matters?
- [ ] Hands/product/action clear in demos?
- [ ] Platform UI avoided?
- [ ] Native captions not blocked?

## Timing QA

- [ ] Captions align with semantic beats?
- [ ] Exposure long enough to read?
- [ ] Micro-rests included when dense?
- [ ] No unnecessary constant motion?

## Accessibility QA

- [ ] Full captions available?
- [ ] Captions include meaningful non-speech audio when needed?
- [ ] Overlay is not the only access layer?
- [ ] Color is not the only information channel?

## Ethics QA

- [ ] Does the overlay clarify rather than confuse?
- [ ] Does any retention gain come from actual usefulness?
- [ ] Are claims accurate and not over-compressed?
